ticket.title: NO VALIDATION PREVENTING EMPTY/₱0 PACKAGE CREATION

test_cases.description: Verify clicking 'Add package' with a blank package name is blocked with a validation message.
test_cases.expected_result: Save is blocked; an inline error prompts for a package name.

test_cases.description: Verify clicking 'Add package' with all rate fields left at 0 is blocked with a validation message.
test_cases.expected_result: Save is blocked; an inline error prompts for at least one valid rate.

test_cases.description: Verify 'Save as draft' still allows incomplete data (blank name/₱0 rate) without blocking.
test_cases.expected_result: Draft saves successfully without validation errors.

test_cases.description: Verify draft packages are visually marked as 'Draft' and are hidden from the Agent-facing package list until completed.
test_cases.expected_result: Draft badge is visible in Admin view; package does not appear anywhere in Agent view.

test_cases.description: Verify a previously created empty/₱0 package (existing data prior to the fix) is flagged for admin review rather than silently exposed to agents.
test_cases.expected_result: Existing incomplete packages are flagged or migrated to Draft status, not left visible to agents as-is.
